query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'fitasty_products' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3KVUcvtm8roQLHR.root --database btNuTCzqZzpzomYwWSYu4y --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'fitasty_products' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int
name	varchar(255)
category	varchar(100)
servingSize	varchar(100)
calories	decimal(8,1)
protein	decimal(6,1)
carbs	decimal(6,1)
fat	decimal(6,1)
description	text
imageUrl	varchar(512)
isActive	int
createdAt	timestamp
updatedAt	timestamp
deletedAt	timestamp
